detail: Gemini adapter now installs GEMINI.md, .gemini/settings.json hooks, .gemini/skills mirror, and Gemini AfterTool logging
reflection: Gemini CLI has first-class project hooks and project-local .gemini/skills, so it can share the same .agent brain with a native adapter instead of a wrapper. Key risk is coexistence with pre-existing GEMINI.md or .gemini/settings.json, so the initial adapter uses merge_or_alert for both files.

action: recall:live Gemini CLI adapter integration test and hook verification
detail: {"returned": ["Write the failing test before writing the fix."], "considered": 6, "source_counts": {"LESSONS.md": 1}, "only_md_available": false}

action: recall:debug Gemini adapter hook activation and skills discovery in live runtime

detail: Gemini adapter now uses hooksConfig/skills settings, copy-only .gemini/skills mirroring, and verified live hook execution in a trusted workspace
reflection: Gemini project hooks were not firing in the first live test because the adapter omitted hooksConfig and the headless scratch workspace under /private/tmp was untrusted. The actual automatic path under /Users/syang works because ~/.gemini/trustedFolders.json already trusts that parent. Gemini also misses symlinked project skills, so .gemini/skills must be a real mirrored directory, not a symlink.

detail: preferences, decisions, lessons, and session trace updated
reflection: Session established registry-not-mirror policy for skills and added dynamic verification for Claude/Codex registry visibility that fails on zero-turn Claude CLI output.
